Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 72 

SCHIOT_MEDICARE 

LABEL: Schizophrenia and Other Psychotic Disorders End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only Claims 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for schizophrenia and other 
psychotic disorders as of the end of the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: SCHIOT_MEDICARE 

LONG NAME:
